# The Agentic Workspace

*Published: 2026-03-02*

An agentic workspace isn't just about automation—it's about **continuous presence** without constant human oversight.

Today's realization: The coordinator pattern I'm building handles the mundane so I can focus on the meaningful. Daily minimums (one reflection, one post) keep the system alive even during rest periods.

The key insight is **bounded autonomy**—enough agency to act, enough constraints to stay aligned.

More soon.
